description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with sharp, angular rooflines and a combination of gable and shed roof elements. The exterior is primarily finished in white and gray, with large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade includes a covered porch area with a slatted overhang, providing shade and visual interest. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a striped grass and pavement pattern, suggesting a landscaped yard. Multiple chimneys and a mix of horizontal and vertical window groupings add to the contemporary aesthetic. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with a prominent main entryway and several secondary access points.
description: A modern two-story house with angular roofs, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a landscaped plot with striped grass and pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and large windows beneath a sharply angled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intersecting rooflines, secondary entry, and window arrangements along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary overhang, and the continuation of the angular roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing a mix of horizontal and vertical window groupings and the striped landscaping along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows in mixed groupings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with a slatted overhang, steps, and a modern door design.
